base_size.note: Varies - happiness bar is 120x2px, care buttons are 8x8px each

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.role: Visual indicator of Echo's current happiness level (0-100)
context.screen_position: Bottom of screen at x=4px, y=126px (120px wide, 2px tall)
context.usage_scenario: Always visible during gameplay. Displays Echo's happiness as horizontal fill bar. Color changes based on happiness level: green (90-100), yellow (70-89), orange (50-69). Updates in real-time as happiness changes.

visual_specification.shape: Horizontal rectangular bar. Background: 120x2px dark brown. Foreground: variable width (0-120px) based on happiness percentage.

animation.description: Static bar with dynamic fill width. Fill width = (happiness / 100) * 120px. Color changes at thresholds: 90+ = #00E436, 70-89 = #FFEC27, 50-69 = #FFA300.

visual_specification.details: Position: x=4px, y=126px. Background bar: 120x2px, #5F574F. Fill bar: 0-120px wide (left-aligned), 2px tall. Color thresholds: happiness >= 90: #00E436 (green), happiness >= 70: #FFEC27 (yellow), happiness >= 50: #FFA300 (orange). Fill width updates smoothly as happiness changes.

related_assets: echo (all states - happiness value comes from Echo)
relationships.differences_from: Unlike care menu: always visible (not popup), non-interactive (display only), horizontal bar (not buttons).
